channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Ebenezers have dumped another sofa, 26th May
item.description:
Another sofa dumped by Ebenezer's salon on the corner and has been there for days. Why do you let them get away with everything?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ebenezers salon blocking the pavement, 26th May
item.description:
I can see this was reported that year too and still no action has been taken. Like with every issue with this salon and you never do anything. Today there are 4 chairs outside blocking the pavement and it's nearly 11pm and they are noisy.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on vanbrugh park road west, vanbrugh park end on communal green but coombe house, 26th May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on vanbrugh park road west, vanbrugh park end on communal green, by coombe housr

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Combe Mews, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light is very bright and overhangs private property, 26th May
item.description:
Light keeps garden, kitchen and nearest bedroom illuminated all evening. This means sleeping area and garden never have any darkness.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hill View Drive, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bike (looks like it has been in the river) dumped in the road and moved to pavement, 26th May
item.description:
Broken bike was dumped in the road on 24 June and has been left on the pavement blocking access. Incapable of use due to smashed front wheel.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Old Woolwich Road, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not working, 26th May
item.description:
They are not working!! Very dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M25, West Thurrock, South Ockendon
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full/Overflowing bins, 26th May
item.description:
Could the various recycling bins be emptied, please? Most of them are full, especially the cardboard bins. It also smells pretty unpleasant there too. Are there food waste bins there because it smells like it?! Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotten bridge with holes. Safety risk for feet and wheels, 26th May
item.description:
The bridge over a ditch on the footpath around Petts wood recreation ground has rotten through and the holes are a danger to the public

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ember Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees need pruning on verge, 26th May
item.description:
There are several trees on the grass verge that are overhanging the pathways below head height and need pruning. There are also trees and shrubs from private properties encroaching across and above the pathway obscuring pedestrian access.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copers Cope Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No light, 26th May
item.description:
Light is out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayplace Road East, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poorly Cut Grass, 26th May
item.description:
The council maintained Grass verges and front areas outside of the homes in the near vicinity of 78 Sevenoaks Way appear to have been cut today (May 26th), and my assumption is that work was carried out by council employees. The work has been done to an unusually poor standard, with large chunks and clumps of grass missed, as well as the grass cuttings being left strewn across the pathways and public walkways outside of the properties. Please could the grass maintenance team return to the area as soon as possible to carry out this work in a full & tidy manner.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78, Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow lines and parking bays, 26th May
item.description:
Please could the yellow lines and parking bays get re marked along Cameron Road? They are faded and bays in particular are very difficult to identify. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Cameron Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New zebra crossing beacons and bollards need codes, 26th May
item.description:
A new zebra crossing has been installed. 4 columns 2 bollards These all need to be coded.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homesdale Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping started last wk and the rubbish is now getting bigger due to more being added, 26th May
item.description:
Flying tipping that started last week, and ive notice this wk more rubbish has been put there, Br53Da. This has been left up against a fence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Nutall Court, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped by the 51 bus stop, 26th May
item.description:
Looks like a large cannister of some kind (guessing its heavy)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peregrine Court, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and driveway, 26th May
item.description:
Multiple cars blocking fire access to flats, emergency access and driveway for 4 garages.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt out car on road, 26th May
item.description:
Glass all over payment, has been like this for at least a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meridian Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked for a while appears abandon, 26th May
item.description:
Been here for a long time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Titmuss Avenue, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 82 Brondesbury Rd, 26th May
item.description:
Large heavy breeze block

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Gauchoworld vandalising pavement again, 26th May
item.description:
9:15pm people are coming in and out of gauchoworld in the process of spray painting neon orange markings on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dove Row, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
